reviews.comment:
Cargué de paso en la ruta 8, camino a Buenos Aires. El personal muy amable y de rápida atención siendo servicial ofreciéndose a revisar el agua, el aceite y limpiar los vidrios

(Translated by Google)
I filled up on Route 8, on my way to Buenos Aires. The staff was very friendly and quick, offering to check the water and oil levels and clean the windows.

reviews.comment:
poca variedad de comida, las tartas super desabridas.
NO tienen la APP de serviclub. .....Lugar limpio.....Podrian actualizarlo y poner un FULL como la mayoria de las estaciones

(Translated by Google)
Little variety of food, super bland cakes.
They don't have the Serviclub app. ..... Clean place.... They could update it and put a FULL rating like most stations.

Atención de primera.
Comidas surtidas y excelente calidad.
Gente muy amable y atenta.

First-class service.
Varied meals of excellent quality.
Very friendly and attentive staff.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención en el sector de compras. La chica que atiende ^SOLA^ Nos dejó de atender a nosotros para atender a una señora, muy mal aducada, el sándwich era puro pan. Horrible.

(Translated by Google)
The service in the shopping area was a disaster. The girl who was working alone stopped serving us to attend to a very rude woman, and the sandwich was just plain bread. Horrible.
